issues.title: dynamically select the embedded  in vector
issues.body:
I hope to dynamically select the embedded model when saving the vector library and similar queries.
For example, by passing an Embedding modename, when performing vector retrieval, I can use the modename I specified for vectorization.

comments.body: Classes such as `OpenAiEmbeddingOptions` let you select the model.  Please reopen if this is not a fix for your issue.
